{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/176753929?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Bhuvanesh66/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Bhuvanesh66/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Bhuvanesh66/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Bhuvanesh66/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Bhuvanesh66", "id": 176753929, "login": "Bhuvanesh66", "node_id": "U_kgDOCokNCQ", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Bhuvanesh66/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Bhuvanesh66/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Bhuvanesh66/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Bhuvanesh66/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Bhuvanesh66/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Bhuvanesh66", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 9.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:H/VI:H/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-287", "name": "Improper Authentication"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-346", "name": "Origin Validation Error"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-639", "name": "Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key"}], "description": "## Summary
 
The MCP router (ext_proc) exposes an `initialize`-method code path that, when a
request carries an `mcp-init-host` header, bypasses the gateway JWT session
validator and rewrites the upstream `:authority` header to whatever the caller
chooses, gated only by a single shared header value (`router-key`). The shared
value is

* a literal string (`secret-api-key`) baked into `cmd/mcp-broker-router/main.go`
  as a fall-back default, and
* in controller-managed deployments, a SHA-256 truncation of the
  `MCPGatewayExtension` UID — a non-secret value visible to anyone with `get`
  permission on the resource, and additionally exposed in `argv` because it is
  passed to the broker-router container via `--mcp-router-key=...`.

A request that satisfies the trivial header check is forwarded to any backend
listener registered with the gateway (including external services such as
`api.githubcopilot.com` when configured), bypassing both the broker (where the
signed `x-mcp-authorized` capability filter is enforced) and the gateway's
JWT-based session model.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-g53w-w6mj-hrpp", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-19T19:42:46Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-g53w-w6mj-hrpp", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-g53w-w6mj-hrpp"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-19T19:42:46Z", "references": ["https://github.com/Kuadrant/mcp-gateway/security/advisories/GHSA-g53w-w6mj-hrpp", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-g53w-w6mj-hrpp"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/Kuadrant/mcp-gateway/security-advisories/GHSA-g53w-w6mj-hrpp", "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/Kuadrant/mcp-gateway", "summary": "MCP Gateway: Authority-injection and JWT/session bypass via the unauthenticated router hair-pin "router-key" / "mcp-init-host" path", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-19T19:42:49Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-g53w-w6mj-hrpp", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/Kuadrant/mcp-gateway"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.6.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: MCP Gateway: Authority-injection and JWT/session bypass via the unauthenticated router hair-pin "router-key" / "mcp-init-host" path
